overall.description: First-person exploration through a rain-slicked cyberpunk city at night, featuring dense neon signage, towering digital billboards, and a mix of narrow alleys and open plazas. The footage is from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing high-fidelity cinematic rendering with ray-traced reflections on wet surfaces.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow neon-lit alley dominated by a bright red 'LIVE BOOZE' sign. The camera moves forward past outdoor plastic seating, turning left as the alley opens up toward a distant plaza with glowing digital billboards becoming visible.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast urban plaza surrounded by towering digital billboards and neon-lit skyscrapers. The '2nd STREET' sign is prominently visible among the advertisements as the camera moves through the open concrete space, transitioning from the enclosed alley to this expansive commercial district.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves beneath a massive concrete overpass, transitioning from the open plaza into a more industrial, sheltered space. A rotating digital billboard stands on the right while the concrete structure dominates overhead, creating a darker, enclosed atmosphere before emerging back into neon-lit areas.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns onto a city street lined with red and white barriers, passing a distinctive rounded corner building. A traditional Japanese restaurant with glowing red paper lanterns appears on the right, contrasting with the modern cyberpunk aesthetic, as the path continues along the wet pavement.

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a narrow covered market alley with an overhead roof structure, creating an enclosed corridor lined with market stalls and dense neon signage. The crowd density increases as the camera moves through this commercial passage, passing the distinctive 'BRAINWASH' advertisement and various shop displays.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic neon alleyway into a sprawling urban plaza before winding back into dense commercial corridors. It begins in a narrow passage dominated by a bright red LIVE BOOZE sign, moving past plastic seating and turning left as the space opens up toward a distant, glowing horizon. The scene then expands into a vast concrete plaza surrounded by towering digital billboards and skyscrapers, including a prominent 2nd STREET sign, before the camera dips beneath the heavy shadow of a massive concrete overpass. As the camera emerges from the industrial shelter, it turns onto a rain-slicked street lined with red and white barriers, passing a rounded building and a traditional Japanese restaurant adorned with glowing red paper lanterns. Finally, the path narrows once more as the camera enters a covered market alley, moving through a crowded corridor of shop displays and dense neon signage past a BRAINWASH advertisement.
